title: Add bulk CSV export for projects
Recurring tasks — weekly and monthly cadence support
Increase pagination limit on project list endpoint from 50 to 500
Reduce search index rebuild time from 4s to 0.8s
Optimise dashboard initial load — lazy-load widgets
Fix race condition on concurrent task status updates causing duplicate entries
Fix email notifications sent twice when task assigned to multiple users
Resolve 500 error on date filter when timezone offset is negative
Update JWT library to address CVE-2026-1234 — token expiry bypass
